basic_details.job_title: NFL Field Representative Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest National Fertilizers Limited (NFL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Field Representative - NDSC Center In charge posts! Published on 13 May 2026 at nationalfertilizers.com , this new recruitment drive offers 40 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range of 18 to 30 years and possessing a Diploma in Agriculture or its subfield/discipline (excluding Horticulture) with 50% marks are eligible to apply online from 13 May 2026 to 12 June 2026. Find all details about the NFL Field Representative - NDSC Center In charge 2026 vacancy, including eligibility, onli

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: SC/ST: 05 years OBC (NCL): 03 years UR PwBD: 10 years SC/ST PwBD: 15 years OBC (NCL) PwBD: 13 years Domiciled in J&K: 05 years (01.01.1980 to 31.12.1989) Apprenticeship training: Equivalent to period of apprenticeship training

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Agriculture or its subfield/discipline (excluding Horticulture) with 50% marks.
qualification.details: Field Representative -NDSC Center In charge: Regular Full time minimum 02 years Diploma or Polytechnic in Agriculture or any subfield/ sub- discipline of Agriculture or in combination of Agriculture in any field/ discipline (excluding Diploma in Horticulture and its sub filed/sub-discipline) with 50% (45% for SC/ST/PwBD/Departmental candidates) marks in aggregate from a Govt. recognized institute/college.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: 21500-52000 Other benefits: Industrial Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance / Company Accommodation and will also be entitled for other perquisites & allowances / benefits such as Leave Encashment, Medical Facilities, Performance Related Pay, Contributory Provident Fund, Gratuity, Contributory Superannuation Benefit Fund Scheme, Group Personal Accident Insurance etc.

selection_process: Offline OMR Based Examination Document Verification Skill (Trade) Test (Qualifying in nature
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NFL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NFL Field Representative -NDSC Center In charge Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the NFL Field Representative -NDSC Center In charge posts is 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a regular full-time 02 years Diploma or Polytechnic in Agriculture or any subfield/discipline of Agriculture (excluding Horticulture) with at least 50% marks from a government-recognized institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Field Representative -NDSC Center In charge post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Field Representative -NDSC Center In charge post is between 18 years and 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Field Representative -NDSC Center In charge position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies announced for the Field Representative -NDSC Center In charge position across India.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC/EWS candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General, OBC, and EWS candidates is 200/- plus applicable bank charges. There is no application fee for SC/ST/PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Offline OMR Based Examination, Document Verification, and a Skill (Trade) Test, which is qualifying in nature if conducted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Field Representative -NDSC Center In charge post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is as per the pay scale of 21500-52000, along with other benefits like Industrial Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance, and other perquisites.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from any state apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment is for positions across India, meaning candidates from any state are eligible to apply, provided they meet the other eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. When will the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the NFL Field Representative -NDSC Center In charge Recruitment 2026 will commence on 13th May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link will be available on the NFL's official website. Direct links are provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
